Header.Info: Performance Monitoring Events for Intel(R) Core(TM) processors based on Lunar Lake performance hybrid architecture - V1.25

Events.BriefDescription: Read CAS command sent to DRAM.
Events.PublicDescription: Read CAS command sent to DRAM

Events.BriefDescription: Write CAS command sent to DRAM.
Events.PublicDescription: Write CAS command sent to DRAM

Events.BriefDescription: ACT command for a read request sent to DRAM.
Events.PublicDescription: ACT command for a read request sent to DRAM

Events.BriefDescription: ACT command for a write request sent to DRAM.
Events.PublicDescription: ACT command for a write request sent to DRAM

Events.BriefDescription: PRE command sent to DRAM for a read/write request.
Events.PublicDescription: PRE command sent to DRAM for a read/write request

Events.BriefDescription: Total number of read and write byte transfers to/from DRAM, in 32B chunk, per DDR channel. Counter increments by 1 after sending  or receiving 32B chunk data.
Events.PublicDescription: Total number of read and write byte transfers to/from DRAM, in 32B chunk, per DDR channel. Counter increments by 1 after sending  or receiving 32B chunk data.

Events.BriefDescription: Counts number of bytes written, in 32B chunk, per DDR channel. Counter increments by 1 after sending 32B chunk data.
Events.PublicDescription: Counts number of bytes written, in 32B chunk, per DDR channel. Counter increments by 1 after sending 32B chunk data.

Events.BriefDescription: Counts number of bytes read, in 32B chunk, per DDR channel. Counter increments by 1 after receiving 32B chunk data.
Events.PublicDescription: This counter counts number of bytes read, in 32B chunk, per DDR channel. Counter increments by 1 after receiving 32B chunk data.

Events.BriefDescription: This 48-bit fixed counter counts the UCLK cycles.
Events.PublicDescription: This 48-bit fixed counter counts the UCLK cycles.
